title: Cobblestone alleys & the old town
description: Step out of the door and you are immediately inside Chur's old town — the heart of Switzerland's oldest continuously inhabited city. Five thousand years of habitation, and you can walk most of it in an afternoon.
imageAlt: View through a historic wooden archway looking onto a narrow cobblestone alley in Chur's old town, featuring pedestrians walking past traditional buildings, potted flowers, a vintage wall lantern, and a hanging wooden sign reading "Zum Stern Cobblestone Alley".
